creator: Hunter, John Dunn, 1798-1827
description: American ed. has title: Manners nad customs of several Indian tribes
subject: Indian captivities
Indians of North America -- Social life and customs
title: Memoirs of a captivity among the Indians of North America, from childhood to the age of nineteen: with anecdotes descriptive of their manners and customs. To which is added, some account of the soil, climate and vegetable productions of the territory westward of the Mississippi
